mSigSpectra 0.0.1
  • Get started
  • Reference

Convenience wrapper: read, annotate, and catalog a set of VCF files

Source: R/catalog_build.R
vcfs_to_catalogs.Rd

Thin composition of read_vcf() + split_vcf() + annotate_vcf() + vcf_to_catalog() for a list of files.

Usage

vcfs_to_catalogs(
  files,
  types,
  ref_genome,
  region = "genome",
  trans_ranges = NULL,
  names_of_vcfs = NULL
)

Arguments

files

Character vector of VCF paths / URLs.

types

Character vector of catalog types to produce (e.g. c("SBS96", "SBS192")). Each file contributes one column per type.

ref_genome

A BSgenome object or character alias.

region

One of "genome", "exome", "transcript", "unknown".

trans_ranges

Optional transcript ranges (see add_transcript_strand()).

names_of_vcfs

Optional character vector of names (same length as files); defaults to basenames without extension.

Value

A named list keyed by types. Each element is a multi-sample catalog matrix (columns = input files).

On this page
